recommendations.title: My Awkward Sexual Adventure
recommendations.overview: A hyper-repressed and schlubby accountant (Jonas Chernick) strikes a deal with a worldly but disorganized stripper (Emily Hampshire): he'll help her with her crushing debt if she helps him become a better lover.

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead
recommendations.overview: After he refuses to disavow his faith, a devout Christian student must prove the existence of God or else his college philosophy professor will fail him.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: The Hippopotamus
recommendations.overview: Disgraced poet Ted Wallace is summoned to his friend's country manor to investigate a series of unexplained miracles.
